heading: Prohibition on imports from and exports to Libya
label: 2349aa–8 Prohibition on imports from and exports to Libya
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the International Security and Development Cooperation Act of 1985, and not as part of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 which comprises this chapter.
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1985 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1985section 1301 of Pub. L. 99–83section 2151–1 of this title

Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section, see Ex. Ord. No. 12163, , 44 F.R. 56673, as amended, set out as a note under .Sept. 29, 1979section 2381 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1985 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1985section 1301 of Pub. L. 99–83section 2151–1 of this title

Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section, see Ex. Ord. No. 12163, , 44 F.R. 56673, as amended, set out as a note under .Sept. 29, 1979section 2381 of this title

children.heading: Prohibition on imports
children.label: a Prohibition on imports
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the President may prohibit any article grown, produced, extracted, or manufactured in Libya from being imported into the United States.

children.heading: Prohibition on exports
children.label: b Prohibition on exports
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the President may prohibit any goods or technology, including technical data or other information, subject to the jurisdiction of the United States or exported by any person subject to the jurisdiction of the United States, from being exported to Libya.

children.heading: “United States” defined
children.label: c “United States” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “United States”, when used in a geographical sense, includes territories and possessions of the United States.
